_comment: Manual mappings: Met API GalleryNumber -> Living Map polygon (matched against the polygon's galleryNumber, falling back to its `name`). Site is authoritative when it disagrees with the object row (the objects pipeline keys site off department === 'The Cloisters', but the merged department is named 'Medieval Art and The Cloisters', so Cloisters objects can arrive site=fifthAve). Plain zero-padded Cloisters numbers (e.g. '010' -> '10') are handled by a generic rule in evals.ts, not listed here.

746.note: Living Map splits 746 into '746 North'/'746 South'; the API says just '746'. North chosen as the anchor (Diker Collection main room) — room-level ambiguity of one wall.

Petrie Ct. Café.note: Sculpture displayed inside the café; the polygon is type=restaurant so it carries no galleryNumber, matched by name.
